title: Roof Pitch Calculator
description: Calculate the pitch of a roof.

R.description: Roof Rise. Units: ft. Difference between bottom and top of the roof

L.description: Run Length. Units: ft. Distance between wall of the building and the roof ridge

uid.description: Calculator unique identifier — must match the endpoint uid.

current_unit_system.description: Unit system for input values and output display.

project_details.description: Optional project metadata for the PDF report header.
